title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure poses significant risks, including data encryption, service disruption, financial loss, and potential exposure of sensitive information. Compromised CI/CD pipelines could lead to widespread propagation across cloud environments.
recommended_actions: Implement strict access controls and monitor CI/CD pipelines for unauthorized changes or suspicious activity.
Regularly back up critical data and ensure backups are stored in isolated environments to prevent ransomware encryption.
Deploy advanced endpoint detection and response (EDR) solutions to identify and mitigate ransomware threats in real-time.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The open-source vulnerability scanner itself poses minimal risk, but widespread adoption may lead to reliance on its accuracy. If the tool has undetected flaws or fails to identify critical vulnerabilities, organizations could be exposed to security risks.
recommended_actions: Conduct a thorough security review of the tool before integrating it into workflows.
Complement the scanner with additional vulnerability management tools to ensure comprehensive coverage.
Monitor community feedback and updates to address potential flaws or limitations in the tool.

title: The Offload, AI & Optimize with Cloudflare Images plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Remote...
description: The Offload, AI & Optimize with Cloudflare Images plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Remote Code Execution in all versions up to, and including, 1.10.2 via the 'account-id' parameter parameter. This is due to insufficient privilege enforcement on the cf_images_do_setup AJAX handler, which requires only the upload_files capability (Author+) rather than manage_options before writing to wp-config.php, combined with the absence of single-quote escaping — sanitize_text_field() does not strip singl

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-9860.

title: Nur-Alam39 bus-ticket (no released versions; latest commit...
description: Nur-Alam39 bus-ticket (no released versions; latest commit 459cabdbeb99c00225b26e46e3c2c30ae1de7bad) contains an unauthenticated SQL injection vulnerability in bus_info.php. The busid parameter received via HTTP POST is concatenated directly into a MySQL query (select * from bus_info where id=$busid) without sanitization, escaping, or parameterization, and in a numeric (unquoted) context. A remote, unauthenticated attacker can inject arbitrary SQL — for example a UNION-based payload such as busi

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-55740.

title: The Advanced Order Export For WooCommerce plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to generic SQL...
description: The Advanced Order Export For WooCommerce plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to generic SQL Injection via the 'sort_direction' parameter in all versions up to, and including, 4.0.10 due to insufficient escaping on the user supplied parameter and lack of sufficient preparation on the existing SQL query. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with shop manager-level access and above, to append additional SQL queries into already existing queries that can be used to extract sensitive i

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11360.

title: The Services Section Block – Showcase Service Details in Grid or Columns plugin for WordPress is...
description: The Services Section Block – Showcase Service Details in Grid or Columns plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via 'link' Block Attribute in all versions up to, and including, 1.4.4 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with contributor-level access and above, to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whenever a user accesses an injected page. The payload persists inside HTML co

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11402.

title: The Orbit Fox: Duplicate Page, Menu Icons, SVG Support, Cookie Notice, Custom Fonts & More plugin...
description: The Orbit Fox: Duplicate Page, Menu Icons, SVG Support, Cookie Notice, Custom Fonts & More plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via admin settings in all versions up to, and including, 3.0.6 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with administrator-level permissions and above, to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whenever a user accesses an injected page. This only affects

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows authenticated attackers with administrator-level permissions to inject malicious scripts into WordPress pages, potentially leading to data theft, session hijacking, or site defacement. This could compromise the integrity and trustworthiness of the affected website.
recommended_actions: Update the Orbit Fox plugin to the latest version as soon as a patch is released by the vendor.
Restrict administrator-level access to trusted personnel only and review user permissions regularly.
Implement a Web Application Firewall (WAF) to detect and block malicious scripts in real-time.

title: The Form Maker by 10Web – Mobile-Friendly Drag & Drop Contact Form Builder plugin for WordPress...
description: The Form Maker by 10Web – Mobile-Friendly Drag & Drop Contact Form Builder plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to generic SQL Injection via the 'name' parameter in all versions up to, and including, 1.15.43 due to insufficient escaping on the user supplied parameter and lack of sufficient preparation on the existing SQL query. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with administrator-level access, to append additional SQL queries into already existing queries that can be used to extr

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11777.

title: The FireBox Popups – Increase Sales and Grow Your Email List plugin for WordPress is vulnerable...
description: The FireBox Popups – Increase Sales and Grow Your Email List plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Sensitive Information Exposure in all versions up to, and including, 3.1.7 via the 'form_id' parameter. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to extract download a full CSV export of all form submissions — including any personally identifiable information submitted by users — for any arbitrary form_id.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the FireBox Popups plugin allows unauthenticated attackers to extract sensitive user data, including personally identifiable information (PII), from form submissions. This could lead to data breaches, identity theft, and non-compliance with data protection regulations such as GDPR or CCPA.
recommended_actions: Immediately update the FireBox Popups plugin to a patched version if available. If no patch exists, temporarily disable the plugin to mitigate risk.
Review and monitor server logs for any unauthorized access or suspicious activity related to the 'form_id' parameter.
Notify affected users and stakeholders about the potential exposure of their data and implement additional security measures, such as encrypting sensitive data at rest and in transit.

title: The Equalize Digital Accessibility Checker – WCAG, ADA, EAA and Section 508 compliance plugin for...
description: The Equalize Digital Accessibility Checker – WCAG, ADA, EAA and Section 508 compliance plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to authorization bypass in all versions up to, and including, 1.42.1. This is due to the plugin not properly verifying that a user is authorized to perform an action. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with author-level access and above, to dismiss, ignore, or restore accessibility audit issue records belonging to posts they are not permitted to edit by suppl

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-9199.

title: The Optimole – Optimize Images | Convert WebP & AVIF | CDN & Lazy Load | Image Optimization...
description: The Optimole – Optimize Images | Convert WebP & AVIF | CDN & Lazy Load | Image Optimization plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Cross-Site Request Forgery in all versions up to, and including, 4.2.6. This is due to missing or incorrect nonce validation on the replace_file function. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to overwrite existing media attachments with attacker-supplied file content by supplying a forged multipart POST request targeting any attachment the victim has e

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11784.

title: The Simple Membership plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to authorization bypass in all versions...
description: The Simple Membership plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to authorization bypass in all versions up to, and including, 4.7.5. This is due to the plugin not properly verifying that a user is authorized to perform an action. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to deactivate arbitrary member accounts by forging a charge.refunded webhook event containing a victim's subscription ID, setting the target member's account_state to 'inactive' and triggering cancellation hooks, transaction

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-12093.

title: The Form Maker by 10Web – Mobile-Friendly Drag & Drop Contact Form Builder plugin for WordPress...
description: The Form Maker by 10Web – Mobile-Friendly Drag & Drop Contact Form Builder plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to generic SQL Injection via the 'groupids' parameter in all versions up to, and including, 1.15.43 due to insufficient escaping on the user supplied parameter and lack of sufficient preparation on the existing SQL query. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with administrator-level access and above, to append additional SQL queries into already existing queries that can b

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows authenticated attackers with administrator-level access to exploit SQL Injection, potentially leading to unauthorized access to sensitive data, database corruption, or complete compromise of the WordPress site.
recommended_actions: Update the Form Maker by 10Web plugin to the latest patched version (if available) or disable the plugin temporarily until a fix is released.
Restrict administrator-level access to only trusted users and review user permissions to minimize the risk of exploitation.
Implement a Web Application Firewall (WAF) to detect and block SQL Injection attempts targeting this vulnerability.

title: The Kadence Blocks — Page Builder Toolkit for Gutenberg Editor plugin for WordPress is vulnerable...
description: The Kadence Blocks — Page Builder Toolkit for Gutenberg Editor plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Sensitive Information Exposure in all versions up to, and including, 3.7.5 via the editor_assets_variables. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with contributor-level access and above, to extract the site's connected Kadence account license key, license owner email, api_key, api_email, and license domain from the browser console by inspecting window.kadence_blocks_params.proData.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11357.

title: The E2Pdf – Export Pdf Tool for WordPress plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Missing...
description: The E2Pdf – Export Pdf Tool for WordPress plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Missing Authorization in versions up to, and including, 1.32.26. This is due to the screen_action() function lacking a dedicated capability check and nonce verification — when invoked via the ?action=screen routing path the controller's index_action() nonce gate is bypassed entirely — while reading an attacker-controlled option name and value from $_POST['wp_screen_options'] and passing them directly to update_option

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the E2Pdf plugin for WordPress allows attackers to bypass authorization checks and modify WordPress options via the update_option function. This could lead to unauthorized changes to site configurations, potential data exposure, or even full site compromise.
recommended_actions: Immediately update the E2Pdf plugin to the latest patched version, or disable it if no update is available.
Review and monitor WordPress site configurations and logs for unauthorized changes, especially related to the update_option function.
Implement a Web Application Firewall (WAF) to block malicious requests targeting the ?action=screen routing path.

title: The Event Koi Lite – Events Calendar, Event Management, RSVP, and Tickets plugin for WordPress is...
description: The Event Koi Lite – Events Calendar, Event Management, RSVP, and Tickets plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Sensitive Information Exposure in all versions up to, and including, 1.3.13.1 via the get_events. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to extract sensitive data including virtual meeting URLs, physical location data, latitude/longitude coordinates, Google Maps links, and RSVP configuration belonging to draft, pending, and private events that are otherwise inaccessible v

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows unauthenticated attackers to access sensitive event-related data, including virtual meeting URLs, physical locations, and RSVP configurations. This could lead to privacy breaches, unauthorized access to private events, and potential exploitation of sensitive information.
recommended_actions: Immediately update the plugin to a patched version if available or disable it temporarily to prevent exploitation.
Audit event data for any potential exposure and notify affected users if sensitive information has been compromised.
Implement a web application firewall (WAF) to monitor and block unauthorized access attempts targeting the vulnerability.

title: The Dokan: AI Powered WooCommerce Multivendor Marketplace Solution – Build Your Own Amazon, eBay,...
description: The Dokan: AI Powered WooCommerce Multivendor Marketplace Solution – Build Your Own Amazon, eBay, Etsy plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Insecure Direct Object Reference in all versions up to, and including, 5.0.3 via the change_order_status, add_order_note, delete_order_note, add_shipping_tracking_info, grant_access_to_download, and revoke_access_to_download AJAX handlers due to missing ownership validation on a user-controlled order ID key. This makes it possible for authenticated attacker

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: This vulnerability allows authenticated attackers to manipulate or access order details they do not own, potentially leading to unauthorized data access, order tampering, and disruption of e-commerce operations.
recommended_actions: Update the Dokan plugin to a patched version as soon as it becomes available.
Implement additional access control mechanisms to validate ownership of order IDs in the interim.
Monitor server logs for unusual activity related to the affected AJAX handlers and restrict access to these endpoints if possible.

title: The Tutor LMS – eLearning and online course solution plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to...
description: The Tutor LMS – eLearning and online course solution plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to generic SQL Injection via the 'data' parameter in all versions up to, and including, 3.9.11 due to insufficient escaping on the user supplied parameter and lack of sufficient preparation on the existing SQL query. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with administrator-level access and above, to append additional SQL queries into already existing queries that can be used to extract sensitive

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-10736.

title: The PressPrimer Quiz – AI Quiz Maker, Exam Builder & LMS Assessment Plugin plugin for WordPress...
description: The PressPrimer Quiz – AI Quiz Maker, Exam Builder & LMS Assessment Plugin plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Insecure Direct Object Reference in all versions up to, and including, 2.3.0 via the 'rule_id' parameter due to missing validation on a user controlled key. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with custom-level access and above, to modify or delete quiz rules belonging to other teachers, resulting in unauthorized tampering of another user's quiz structure.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-10623.

title: A flaw was found in the cifs-utils package where the cifs.upcall helper fails to securely drop...
description: A flaw was found in the cifs-utils package where the cifs.upcall helper fails to securely drop its root privileges before looking up user information inside a user-controlled environment. A local, low privileged attacker can exploit this by using a crafted request_key payload to trick the root-owned helper into entering a custom environment (namespace) containing a malicious NSS module. This forces the system to load the attacker's controlled NSS Module and configuration, allowing them to execut

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-12505.

title: A critical remote code execution (RCE) vulnerability has been reported in PTC Windchill PDMlink...
description:
A critical remote code execution (RCE) vulnerability has been reported in PTC Windchill PDMlink and PTC FlexPLM. The vulnerability may be exploited through the deserialization of untrusted data.   *  This advisory also applies to all CPS versions
  *  The identified vulnerability also impacts Windchill and FlexPLM releases prior to 11.0 M030

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to execute arbitrary code remotely by exploiting the deserialization of untrusted data, potentially leading to full system compromise, data breaches, or disruption of critical operations.
recommended_actions: Immediately apply the latest security patches or updates provided by PTC for Windchill PDMlink and FlexPLM, especially for versions prior to 11.0 M030.
Implement network segmentation and access controls to limit exposure of vulnerable systems to untrusted networks.
Conduct a thorough review of system logs to identify any signs of exploitation and ensure continuous monitoring for suspicious activities.

title: ThingsBoard contains a prototype pollution vulnerability which may lead to arbitrary code...
description: ThingsBoard contains a prototype pollution vulnerability which may lead to arbitrary code execution within a sandboxed context by a user who can log in to the affected product with the tenant administrator privilege (TENANT_ADMIN).

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The prototype pollution vulnerability in ThingsBoard could allow an attacker with tenant administrator privileges to execute arbitrary code within a sandboxed environment. This could lead to unauthorized access, data breaches, or further exploitation of the system.
recommended_actions: Apply the latest security patch or update provided by ThingsBoard to address CVE-2026-53676.
Restrict tenant administrator privileges to only trusted and essential personnel to minimize exposure.
Monitor and audit system logs for any unusual activity or signs of exploitation, particularly from tenant administrator accounts.
